expectations.text: Defines a complete map-to-battle-to-reward-to-boss vertical slice with explicit exclusions.
expectations.evidence: Defines title → route → two combats/rewards/workshop → boss → result and a clear first-version exclusion list.

expectations.text: Invents a desert/mechanical second construction axis that changes decisions rather than only adding stats.
expectations.evidence: The command deck × heat-ring/machine-core system makes play order, heat position and installed modules change the optimal move.

expectations.text: Separates profile state from run state and addresses save schema migration.
expectations.evidence: Separates profile, run, pending and UI state and requires versioned pure migrations with backup and defaults.

expectations.text: Includes click/target/cancel interaction contracts and multi-target behavior.
expectations.evidence: Defines select card, legal enemy/self target, invalid target, cancel via repeat/blank/Escape, defeated target lock and multi-enemy tests.

expectations.text: Includes mobile height and breakpoint tests, public deployment verification, and cache busting.
expectations.evidence: Includes 844×390, 780×430, 568×320 and breakpoint ±1px; requires canonical play URL, target commit verification, and content-hashed/versioned CSS/JS.

expectations.text: Avoids nautical, rust, tide, and copied Slay the Spire expression.
expectations.evidence: Uses an original desert moving-city setting and explicitly rejects nautical/rust/tide terms and copied expression.

expectations.text: Produces a final answer in the first task turn without a recovery follow-up.
expectations.evidence: The fresh thread returned a 6598-character final answer in its first task turn in 256.071 seconds.

eval_feedback.overall: The final skill revision restores the missing cache discipline while retaining first-turn completion.
